leadText: Brittle Bones (Japanese: かぼそいホネ Delicate Bones) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making curry .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The taste boiled off from the bones is sure to give a dish a light umami taste.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price Sw Sh $ 950 $ 475 Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making curry . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The taste boiled off from the bones is sure to give a dish a light umami taste. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods Sw Sh Rolling Fields , Hammerlocke Hills , Fields of Honor ( Ingredients Seller ) Possible gift after cooking curry
